title.en: Virtual Threads, Runtime Scheduling, and the Linux Kernel Thread Model
title.zh: 虚拟线程的本质、运行时调度与 Linux 内核线程模型研究

summary.en: A comparative explanation of Java virtual threads, Go goroutines, Linux task_struct, user-mode scheduling, blocking I/O unmounting, clone paths, and kernel-visible thread boundaries.
summary.zh: 对比 Java 虚拟线程、Go goroutine 与 Linux task_struct，解释用户态调度、阻塞卸载、clone 调用链和内核线程模型的边界。

readingDirection.en: Read this when evaluating Java virtual threads, Go goroutines, M:N scheduling, blocking I/O behavior, or their relationship with Linux kernel threads.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在评估 Java 虚拟线程、Go goroutine、M:N 调度、阻塞 I/O 与 Linux 内核线程关系时阅读。
